title: 20 Greatest Telugu Films — The Tollywood Canon
description: From Baahubali to RRR — the films that made Telugu cinema a global force.
intro: Telugu cinema went from a regional industry to a global phenomenon in a decade. These 20 films explain exactly how that happened.

entries.blurb: India's most spectacular blockbuster. A modern epic.

entries.blurb: The film that made the world fall in love with Indian mass cinema.
